commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: After our Redeemer had heard the confession of his first apostle, who spoke in the name of all, as the head, he opens out to them the grand mystery of his passion.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: Now this is He who was born of Mary; for He says: "The Son of man must suffer many things, and be rejected, and crucified, and on the third day rise again."
